name: @narada2/agent-context-mcp
description: Agent-context MCP surface for site-local startup hydration and checkpoints.

scripts.test: pnpm build && node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning dist/test/agent-context-mcp.test.js && node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning dist/test/continuation-projection.test.js && node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning dist/test/protocol-smoke.test.js && node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning dist/test/site-fabric-agent-context-e2e.test.js && node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning dist/test/session-start-roster.test.js && node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning dist/test/session-start-migrations.test.js
